text:
VERDICT: LIKELY
EXPLANATION: The real paper exists in *Radiology* (2020, 297(1):64–72, DOI 10.1148/radiol.2020200466) but its actual title is "Automated **Abdominal** CT Imaging Biomarkers for Opportunistic Prediction of Future Major Osteoporotic Fractures in Asymptomatic Adults," and its real authors are Pickhardt, Graffy, Zea, Lee, Liu, Sandfort, and Summers — not "Pickhardt, Summers, Garrett, et al." as cited. The cited title omits the word "Abdominal" and substitutes entirely different co-authors (Summers appears but Garrett and Graffy are swapped/fabricated in the lead position), making this a grafted/distorted reference.
LINK: https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/32780005/
